The Role of CRISPR-Cas9 in Treating Primary Immunodeficiency Disorders - AZO

The Last Piece of Our Genome: Sequencing the Y Chromosome Dylan Taylor A full sequence of the Y chromosome, a feat that has challenged scientists for years, has been accomplished for the first time. In this interview, we speak to Dylan Taylor about this impactful research and how it may shape our understanding of human genetics. - AZO

Breaking Down the Onso System: PacBio's Genomic Advancement Mark Van Oene, PacBio We speak with Mark Van Oene, Chief Operating Officer at PacBio, on the company's cutting-edge Onso system and its role in advancing genomics research. The Onso system is poised to expand applications in genomics, including liquid biopsy, and improve sensitivity in variant detection. - AZO

The Exclusome, A New Mammalian "Container" We speak to Dr. Ruth Kroschewski about new research that details the existence of an 'exclusome', a cytoplasmic container that appears to explain where extra-chromosomal DNA goes once it is in a cell. - AZO
共创可持续健康生活 我们携手来自世界各地的多元创作者，开启一场探索之旅，共同打造了10个沉浸式房间，借此展示我们对可持续健康生活的憧憬，并展现这些创作者别具一格的审美和独到的设计理念。 - 宜家
日常仪式 探索那些能改变你生活的小习惯。 - 宜家
风格至上！ 每个人，每个家，乃至世事万物都有自己的风格和外观。我们的物品透露出我们的个性。从我们的共创艺术家及其个性风格汲取灵感，从缤纷色彩、极简主义到日式和风，各有特色。你的风格是什么呢？ - 宜家
体现生活仪式的储物创意和技巧 很多时候，一点巧妙灵感，就能助你高效利用空间，满足你的需求。整理分类你的珍贵物品和心爱好物，决定是收纳起来以腾出更多空间，还是自豪地展示出来。 - 宜家
